summary: A recorded Fox News segment ('FOX NEWS ALERT', chyron 'NOEM WARNS CRIMINALS AMID EL SALVADOR PRISON TOUR') in which an anchor and national correspondent Griff Jenkins discuss Sec. Noem's CECOT visit and her 'do not come' warning, intercut with footage of Noem at the prison and a flashback of VP Harris in Guatemala. Audio is anchors and reporters talking, no music. This is cable-news footage, not youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: NOEM: THIS FACILITY IS ONE OF THE TOOLS WE CAN USE; NOEM WARNS CRIMINALS AMID EL SALVADOR PRISON TOUR; FOX NEWS ALERT; FLASHBACK: VP HARRIS OFFERS WARNING TO MIGRANTS
